research_direction: Mine Binance USD-M futures short-horizon factors for BTCUSDT and SOLUSDT using 1m futures OHLCV, quote_volume, trade_count, taker_buy_base_volume, taker_buy_quote_volume, premium_close, mark_close, and funding_rate. Focus on whether crowded perpetual pressure, measured by positive or negative premium-index extremes, mark-vs-last-price divergence, recent funding-rate pressure, and abnormal taker-buy imbalance after short-term price extension, predicts 15-minute to 1-hour mean reversion rather than continuation on BTCUSDT and SOLUSDT separately and jointly. Other liquid USDT perpetual contracts may be used later as cross-asset context features, but the tradable/evaluated outputs must remain BTCUSDT and SOLUSDT only unless the config explicitly separates feature_universe from tradable_universe. Prefer factors that normalize premium, funding, and taker imbalance by symbol-specific rolling 1-day to 7-day distributions and condition on liquidity/volatility regimes. Avoid raw price-only momentum, unavailable open-interest or long-short-ratio fields, centered rolling windows, negative shifts, or any future-looking input.
